title: oplismenus hirtellus subsp. loliaceus
intro: Oplismenus hirtellus subsp. loliaceus, also known as Loliaceus false barley grass, is a type of grass native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Loliaceus false barley grass include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage and inflammation. Loliaceus false barley grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
